changes.description: Added normalizeCaveat() with EXACT_TRANSFORMS + ID_PATTERNS. Applied to caveat render block. Eliminates CONCEPT-XX, BC-XX, chain notation from CLM-25 hero panel.
5 domain cards for CLM-09/20/25/12/10. Evidence badge, executive description, primary metric per domain.
Pure SVG hub-and-spoke graph. CLM-25 center hub, 4 satellites, spoke edges colored by evidence_class, focus glow on CLM-20.
CLM-20 spotlight: business exposure, what is known, what requires validation (normalized), cross-connections teaser.
Replaces ExecutionVisibilityMap. 4 visibility rows, prominent View governed detail CTA to /topology.
Added 4 new component imports. Removed ExecutionVisibilityMap inline function and traceAvailable. Rebalanced page flow per TOPOLOGY.INTELLIGENCE.01.
